hooks.name: protect-schema-rb
hooks.run:
echo '❌ Error: Direct edits to db/schema.rb are not allowed

schema.rb is an auto-generated file. It should only be modified by:
  1. Running Rails migrations: bundle exec rails db:migrate
  2. Loading the schema: bundle exec rails db:schema:load

To fix:
  1. Undo the edit
  2. Create and run a migration instead: bundle exec rails generate migration YourMigrationName

Use /force-edit to override this protection if absolutely necessary.' && exit 1
